_comment: PUBLIC, sanitized projection of registry.yaml for kartel.org.uk. Contains ONLY public fields — no PII, no secrets, no internal IPs/hosts, no review queues. The PUBLIC/PRIVATE firewall between kartel-core (private) and kartel-site (public). Regenerate from registry.yaml on any governance change.
authority: KARTEL Core owns the canonical layers. Platforms consume or steward; none owns Core.

canonicalLayers.name: Membership Edge
canonicalLayers.note: ACTIVE operational Federation Contract (R0 EO 2026-06-18). All federation-facing membership projections, observability surfaces, and cross-platform topology traversals conform to it. Read-projection only — NOT a layer/registry/service/authority/runtime SoT; Core stores no membership data; platforms remain authoritative.

layerRegistry.name: Identity Registry
layerRegistry.purpose: One federated identity across every platform — a single person is the same subject everywhere.

layerRegistry.name: Geography Registry
layerRegistry.purpose: One canonical UK region taxonomy. Platforms consume; they never self-author regions.

layerRegistry.name: Organisation Registry
layerRegistry.purpose: One canonical organisation hierarchy: CEA → Foundation → School → Venue.

layerRegistry.name: Campus Registry
layerRegistry.purpose: One canonical identity per accredited operating centre. A campus may be SCHOOL-tier (owns accreditation, classes, governance); orthogonal to its institution, not a child of it.

layerRegistry.name: Federation Registry
layerRegistry.purpose: The integration gate every project passes before production — the federation's rule of admission.

projects.name: MoyPolk
projects.summary: Immortal Regiment UK memorial platform. Produces + serves the canonical geography taxonomy.

projects.name: RusJAz
projects.summary: Russian-language education marketplace + LMS. Identity reference implementation; consumes canonical geography, organisation + campus anchors.

projects.name: Community Group
projects.summary: Cultural funding & trust platform (CEA). Consumes identity + geography; first geography consumer.

projects.name: RusJAzz
projects.summary: Future module. Builds against the Federation Integration Gate from day one.

organisationRegistry.authority: KARTEL Core owns the canonical organisation registry. Platforms consume; they do not author canonical organisations. canonicalOrgCode is a readable key (not a UUID). The registry holds INSTITUTIONS only (per the ratified Org Architecture CEA → Foundation → School). Operating accredited centres are anchored separately in the Campus Registry (campusCode) — orthogonal to, not a child of, the institution. This keeps brand identity (canonicalOrgCode) distinct from operating-centre identity (campusCode).
organisationRegistry.supersedes: The earlier campusesFuture stub is now realised as the top-level campusRegistry.

campusRegistry.authority: KARTEL Core owns the canonical Campus Registry. A campus is an ACCREDITED OPERATING CENTRE — it may own accreditation, classes, curriculum grants and governance, so it is SCHOOL-tier, NOT a Venue. (Venue ≠ Campus: a Venue is a physical room/hall/building BELOW school tier; a Campus is the accreditable centre itself.) campusCode and canonicalOrgCode are ORTHOGONAL dimensions, not parent-child: canonicalOrgCode = institutional/brand identity; campusCode = operating-centre identity. Platforms consume campusCode; they do not author campuses. Established by R0 ratification 2026-06-18 (P3D), informed by the P3D.2 venue-reality audit.

federationGate.rule: No new KARTEL project may enter production unless it passes all 8 items.

items.name: CPIF authentication
items.description: Federated identity via the shared Keycloak realm; local mirror of the subject.

items.name: Canonical geography
items.description: Store CanonicalRegionCode (ITL1); consume the taxonomy API; never self-author regions.

items.name: Organisation anchor
items.description: Reference canonical organisations; do not author canonical orgs locally.

items.name: Membership contract
items.description: Conform membership edges to the shared shape.

items.name: Permission pattern
items.description: Local roles; delegation-grant pattern; no global role catalogue.

items.name: Notification envelope
items.description: Conform notifications to the shared envelope.

items.name: Audit envelope
items.description: Append-only audit conforming to the shared envelope.

contracts.note: Types only — no runtime logic. Conformance = federation. Domain vocabularies stay local; only the shape is shared.

keys.name: CpifSubjectId
keys.description: One identity — the mirrored Keycloak subject.

keys.name: CanonicalRegionCode
keys.description: One geography — the ITL1 canonical region code.

contracts.name: MembershipEdge
contracts.note: R0 EO 2026-06-18 — ACTIVE operational contract; read-projection (subject→canonical anchor, opaque relation, status); zero authority; Core stores no data; separate from PermissionGrant.
